fundamentals.name: MP Materials Corp.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MP Materials Corp., together with its subsidiaries, produces rare earth materials in the Western Hemisphere. It operates in two segments, Materials and Magnetics. The Materials segment owns and operates the Mountain Pass Rare Earth Mine and Processing facility located near Mountain Pass, San Bernardino County, California. The Magnetics segment produces magnetic precursor products, including NdPr metal; and manufactures NdFeB permanent magnets. MP Materials Corp. was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada.

judgment.summary: MP Materials shows strong revenue growth and positive analyst sentiment, but suffers from negative margins and a high forward P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 118.6% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth estimates are very high for the current quarter (152.9%) and fiscal year (229.6%).
Strong buy consensus from 15 analysts with a mean target of $80.40.
Healthy liquidity with a current ratio of 7.18 and quick ratio of 6.51, supported by $1.74B in cash.
Last quarter's EPS beat estimates by a significant margin (174.6%).
negatives: Operating margin of -7.9% and profit margin of -20.5% indicate unprofitability.
Return on equity (-4.2%) and return on assets (-2.1%) are negative.
Forward P/E of 58.16x is very high, suggesting aggressive growth expectations are priced in.
Free cash flow is negative at $-174.84M TTM.
High beta of 1.91 suggests higher volatility compared to the market.

news.paragraph: MP Materials stock is facing headwinds despite a recent partnership with Apple and a Barclays 'Overweight' initiation, with geopolitical tensions surrounding rare earth elements also creating uncertainty. While analyst sentiment remains strongly positive with a mean target of $80.40, the stock's recent performance suggests market concerns about valuation and operational profitability are outweighing positive developments. The upcoming earnings report on August 6th will be crucial for assessing the impact of these factors.
